calendar.matters:
HEARING ON BILLYBRUCE RONALD LAMBERT'S PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME OF AN ANULT AND A MINOR
Off Calendar Feb-06-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The matter came on for Change of name of Petitioner Billybruce Ronald Lambert and his sone Billybruce Ronald Lambert Jr.

Dept.505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: D. Carter; - Matter not reported

Petitioner Billyruce Ronald Lambert appeared in pro per, was placed under oath and testified.

Petition for change of name and gender filed May 19, 2023.

Order to show cause filed December 2, 2025.

Notice of hearing filed Januray 30, 2026.

The Court addresses the petitioner.

The Petitioner provides testimony.

After reviewing the petition, hearing the testimony and there are no objections filed, The Court grants Petitioner's request for change his name.

The court does not grant Petitioner's request to change the name of his son Billybruce Ronald Lambert Jr.

The minor is 15 and can Petition to change his name when he is 18.

Order Recognizing name change and for issuance of new certificates signed and filed this day.
